summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar 1968 Shrine show, highlighted by a smoking Dark Star/Eleven sequence and an all‑time great Alligator jam.
review: Fans rave about the crystal‑clear, headphone‑friendly soundboard mix, noting only a brief cut in The Eleven. Musically the concert is praised as a peak‑time performance with Dark Star, The Eleven and an unforgettable Alligator>Caution jam standing out, while Jerry’s tone and Phil’s adventurous bass work receive special mention.

ai_rating.rationale: Overwhelmingly positive fan commentary (10 × 5‑star, 2 × 4‑star) praises both the recording fidelity and the musical highlights; only minor criticisms (a cut in The Eleven) keep the rating just shy of perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, headphone‑friendly mix with clear instrument separation. A small edit/cut is noted in The Eleven, but overall the tape sounds clean and well‑mastered.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The middle of the show shines with a Dark Star → St. Stephen → The Eleven sequence and a powerful Alligator>Caution jam, giving the concert an energetic arc that fans describe as ‘peak time.’

band_member_comments.Jerry: Tone described as perfect; overall playing called phenomenal.
band_member_comments.Phil: His bass jump‑starts the Alligator jam (a few bars early) and drives the adventurous jams.
